name: Wattsychic Fighter
name_jp: エレキック・ファイター
desc: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 card in your opponent's Graveyard; place it on either the top or bottom of their Deck. You can only use this effect of "Wattsychic Fighter" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 card in your opponent's Graveyard; place it on either the top or bottom of their Deck. You can only use this effect of "Wattsychic Fighter" once per turn.
eff: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 card in your opponent's Graveyard; place it on either the top or bottom of their Deck. You can only use this effect of "Wattsychic Fighter" once per turn.

action: Places cards from the opponent's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
